title: Add log-level flag for skopeo
body:
PR https://github.com/containers/image/pull/2713 should really be type `Tracef` rather than `Debugf`, but `skopeo` doesn't support any log level except what the `--debug` flag offers.

More-or-less copy the `--log-level` behavior from `podman` for compatibility and this should allow for `Trace` `logrus` levels to work.

Keep the debug flag for backwards compatibility as well and it make it mutually exclusive with `--debug`.

comments.body: First time actually pushing a cobra change and making sure a global log level is applied to the containers org, would appreciate fact-checking to make sure I didn't break anything.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
@robbmanes have you had a chance to address @mtrmac 's concerns?
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
